posts.text: Every option is fraught. A deal big enough to satisfy Donald Trump and Marco Rubio looks hard to achieve. But military action may fail to accomplish what diplomacy has not https://www.economist.com/the-americas/2026/05/27/would-american-military-action-against-cuba-work?taid=6a19eb9a4b8aea00012d75d9&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
BREAKING: President Trump's Situation Room meeting on a possible deal with Iran lasted for 2 hours, but did not end with a final decision on any new deal with Iran, per NYT.

The Trump Administration believes it is "close" to an agreement but there are uncertainties including the unfreezing of Iranian funds.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
“So I get that your energy fund got flat-footed by COVID, but how did you lose this much as inventory drew 12mm bbl/d??”

Bet this is gonna be the first question for every energy GP during a DD call for the rest of this decade…
posts.author: hkuppy
